post_fix_for: VIB-5018 + VIB-4586 identity-faithful V4 LP snapshot valuation (PR #2678 merged 2026-06-10) — killed the $289.6M corruption
VIB-5024 gateway V4 PositionManager reader → HIGH-confidence on-chain valuation + V3-parity uncollected fees (PR #2680 merged 2026-06-11)
VIB-4583 Uniswap V4 position_registry support (PR #2681 merged 2026-06-11)
VIB-4537 scrub-and-refreeze of the lp_v4 baseline DB + matrix cells (this PR)
_provenance.note: Real-Anvil-Base re-baseline for the lp_v4 fixture after the V4 valuation last-mile. Movement vs the previous baseline (12 PASS / 2 FAIL / 7 XFAIL / 1 SKIP, captured 2026-05-17 at 43f6866da): FIVE cells XFAIL->PASS, ZERO regressions (matrix scorer: status=PASS, regressions=[], 0 PASS->non-PASS). G14 and G15 (sdk-value === on-chain-value reconciliation) flipped XFAIL->PASS because VIB-5024 now reads live liquidity/ticks (StateView.getSlot0) and computes exact concentrated-liquidity amounts, so the snapshot mark is on-chain truth at HIGH confidence rather than an open-amount estimate. LP2/LP5/LP6 flipped XFAIL->PASS on the same HIGH-confidence valuation (LP reconciliation cells that depended on a trustworthy on-chain mark). G6 and LP3 remain FAIL: both require per-event fee/principal separation written onto position_events.fees_token0/1 (VIB-4482 / P-V1-A) — VIB-5024's fee read lives in the snapshot VALUATION path (portfolio_snapshots), not the accounting-EVENT path, so position_events still carry no fees and these cells are honestly non-PASS (fee0_set=0 on both OPEN and CLOSE). L5_22 remains XFAIL (registry mode not toggled on for this fixture row, independent of the VIB-4583 write path) and LP4 remains XFAIL (IL_USD divergence, flips to PASS with V1 fee separation). Verification matrix run: 257s on managed Anvil-Base.
_provenance.value_usd_artefact: VIB-4537 disposition (Option 2 scrub-and-refreeze, 2026-06-11): artefact (A) is RESOLVED. The prior baseline carried portfolio_snapshots.total_value_usd up to $289.6M from inflated V4-LP amount0/amount1 (~10^7); after VIB-5018 (identity-faithful valuation) + VIB-5024 (on-chain HIGH valuation) the V4 LP now marks correctly at $3.88 at value_confidence=HIGH (max total_value_usd=$3.88; was $289,600,000). Artefact (B) PERSISTS and is unrelated to V4: framework available_cash_usd ~$164.5k is uncorrelated with the row wallet_balances_json (~$95) and is constant across rows — shared-wallet capture contamination (same family as VIB-4970), orthogonal to cell STATUS (G4/G8/G9 PASS regardless). Not in scope for VIB-4537; tracked under the VIB-4970 family.
